impact: This gives the PP&D daemon deterministic coverage that superseded broad blocked work remains parked outside selectable checkbox form and does not prevent selecting the next independent needed task.
target_task: Task checkbox-71: Add a supervisor reconciliation fixture and daemon self-test check proving that a blocked task superseded by a later accepted narrower recovery is parked outside selectable checkbox form, while the daemon still selects the next independent `[ ]` task instead of reporting `no_eligible_tasks`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
